---
title: "Codebook Development History"
subtitle: "Cross-codebook iteration summary with H&K-style reporting"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| cache: false

library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(here)

here::i_am("notebooks/iteration_summary.qmd")
tar_config_set(store = here("_targets"))
source(here("R/gt_theme.R"))
source(here("R/iteration_reporting.R"))

il <- tar_read(iteration_logs)
```

## Iteration Timeline

```{r}
#| label: tbl-timeline

il$meta |>
  select(codebook, iteration, codebook_version, date, model, stage) |>
  mutate(
    model_short = case_when(
      is.na(model) ~ "---",
      grepl("haiku", model) ~ "Haiku",
      grepl("sonnet", model) ~ "Sonnet",
      grepl("qwen", model) ~ "Qwen 72B",
      grepl("llama", model) ~ "Llama 70B",
      grepl("gemini-2.5-flash", model) ~ "Gemini 2.5 Flash",
      grepl("gemini-3.1-flash-lite", model) ~ "Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite",
      TRUE ~ model
    )
  ) |>
  select(-model) |>
  rename(model = model_short) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_label(
    codebook = "CB", iteration = "Iter", codebook_version = "Version",
    date = "Date", model = "Model", stage = "Stage"
  ) |>
  gt_theme_report()
```

## S1: Behavioral Tests {#sec-s1}

S1 results for the latest formal (Haiku/Sonnet) run per codebook, following H&K Figure 3.

```{r}
#| label: fig-s1-behavioral
#| fig-cap: "S1 behavioral test results. For Tests I--III, higher is better. For Test IV, Fleiss' Kappa shown."
#| fig-height: 6

# Latest formal S1 per codebook
latest_s1 <- il$s1 |>
  filter(grepl("^claude-", model)) |>
  group_by(codebook) |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration)) |>
  ungroup()

plot_s1_behavioral(latest_s1)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-s1-summary

latest_s1 |>
  mutate(
    test_label = case_when(
      grepl("^I_", test) ~ "I: Legal Labels",
      grepl("^II_", test) ~ "II: Definition Recovery",
      grepl("^III_", test) ~ "III: Example Recovery",
      grepl("^IV_", test) ~ "IV: Order Invariance"
    ),
    value_fmt = case_when(
      skipped ~ "skipped",
      grepl("IV", test) ~ sprintf("%.1f%% (k=%.2f)", value * 100,
                                   coalesce(fleiss_kappa, NA_real_)),
      TRUE ~ sprintf("%.0f%%", value * 100)
    ),
    threshold_fmt = case_when(
      grepl("IV", test) ~ "< 5%",
      TRUE ~ sprintf(">= %.0f%%", threshold * 100)
    ),
    status = if_else(pass, "Pass", "Fail")
  ) |>
  select(codebook, test_label, value_fmt, threshold_fmt, status) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_label(
    codebook = "CB", test_label = "Test",
    value_fmt = "Result", threshold_fmt = "Threshold", status = "Status"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#E8F5E9"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = status == "Pass")
  ) |>
  gt_theme_report()
```

## S2: Zero-Shot Evaluation {#sec-s2}

### C1 Measure Identification

```{r}
#| label: tbl-c1-s2

# Latest formal C1 S2
c1_s2_latest <- il$s2 |>
  filter(codebook == "c1", grepl("^claude-", model)) |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration))

gt_s2_metrics_table(c1_s2_latest,
  title = sprintf("C1 S2 (iteration %d, %s)",
    c1_s2_latest$iteration[1], c1_s2_latest$model[1]))
```

### C2b Motivation Classification

```{r}
#| label: tbl-c2b-s2

# Latest formal C2b S2
c2b_s2_latest <- il$s2 |>
  filter(codebook == "c2b", grepl("^claude-", model)) |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration))

gt_s2_metrics_table(c2b_s2_latest,
  title = sprintf("C2b S2 (iteration %d, %s)",
    c2b_s2_latest$iteration[1], c2b_s2_latest$model[1]))
```

### C2b Per-Class Performance

```{r}
#| label: tbl-c2b-perclass

c2b_pc_latest <- il$s2_per_class |>
  filter(codebook == "c2b") |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration))

if (nrow(c2b_pc_latest) > 0) {
  c2b_pc_latest |>
    select(class, precision, recall, f1, support) |>
    gt() |>
    cols_label(
      class = "Class", precision = "Precision", recall = "Recall",
      f1 = "F1", support = "N"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(columns = c(precision, recall, f1), decimals = 3) |>
    gt_theme_report()
}
```

### Metric Trajectories

```{r}
#| label: fig-c1-recall-trajectory
#| fig-cap: "C1 combined recall across formal (Claude) iterations"

plot_metric_trajectory(il$s2, "combined_recall", codebook_filter = "c1")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-c2b-wf1-trajectory
#| fig-cap: "C2b weighted F1 across formal (Claude) iterations"

plot_metric_trajectory(il$s2, "weighted_f1", codebook_filter = "c2b")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-c2b-exo-trajectory
#| fig-cap: "C2b exogenous precision across formal (Claude) iterations"

plot_metric_trajectory(il$s2, "exogenous_precision", codebook_filter = "c2b")
```

## S3: Error Analysis {#sec-s3}

### S3 Behavioral Tests

```{r}
#| label: fig-c1-s3
#| fig-cap: "C1 S3 behavioral tests (latest formal run)"

c1_s3_latest <- il$s3 |>
  filter(codebook == "c1", grepl("^claude-", model)) |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration))

c1_abl_latest <- il$s3_ablation |>
  filter(codebook == "c1", grepl("^claude-", model)) |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration))

plot_s3_behavioral(c1_s3_latest, c1_abl_latest)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-c2b-s3
#| fig-cap: "C2b S3 behavioral tests (latest formal run)"

c2b_s3_latest <- il$s3 |>
  filter(codebook == "c2b", grepl("^claude-", model)) |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration))

c2b_abl_latest <- il$s3_ablation |>
  filter(codebook == "c2b", grepl("^claude-", model)) |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration))

plot_s3_behavioral(c2b_s3_latest, c2b_abl_latest)
```

### Ablation Studies

```{r}
#| label: tbl-c1-ablation
#| tbl-cap: "C1 ablation (latest formal run)"

gt_ablation_table(c1_abl_latest)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-c2b-ablation
#| tbl-cap: "C2b ablation (latest formal run)"

gt_ablation_table(c2b_abl_latest)
```

### Manual Error Analysis

```{r}
#| label: tbl-c1-manual
#| tbl-cap: "C1 manual error analysis (latest)"

c1_manual_latest <- il$s3_manual |>
  filter(codebook == "c1") |>
  filter(iteration == max(iteration))

gt_manual_analysis_table(c1_manual_latest)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-c2b-manual
#| tbl-cap: "C2b manual error analysis"

c2b_manual <- il$s3_manual |>
  filter(codebook == "c2b")

if (nrow(c2b_manual) > 0) {
  c2b_manual_latest <- c2b_manual |>
    filter(iteration == max(iteration))
  gt_manual_analysis_table(c2b_manual_latest)
} else {
  cat("No C2b manual analysis data available yet.")
}
```
